untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific candlestick pattern formations (e.g., breakout from consolidation, triangle, rectangle patterns) which require pattern recognition logic not available in the indicator-based rule engine. The source text references '10-day performance rank' and S&P 500 index performance statistics that are not translatable to real-time trading indicators. Breakout completion timing (2-3 days) is inferred but pattern detection itself cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate as a generic breakout signal using price action (close breaking prev_high/low with bullish/bearish body), but true candlestick pattern identification (e.g., triangle breakout, consolidation breakout) requires pattern-matching logic beyond indicator thresholds. Consider using volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20 > 1.2) if pattern is pre-identified externally. Hold period set to 3 days per source. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both bullish and bearish patterns.
